title: Remington All-in-One Grooming Kit Beard Trimmer (4 Attachments, Beard & Hair Comb, Nose & Ear, Detail Trimmer, Mini Foil Shaver, 3 Combs, Stainless Steel Blades, 40-Minute Run Time, Cordless) PG6020

features: 30mm Main Trimmer with Self-Sharpening Stainless Steel Blades For close trimming of hair and beard and premium cutting performance.
3x Fixed Combs (3mm-9mm) and Detail Trimmer For a variety of stubble looks; body hair maintenance; fine detailing and hard to reach areas.
Linear Nose and Ear Trimmer and Mini Foil Shaver For trimming nose and ear hair. The shaver can be used for close shaving of small areas and tidying the edges of your facial hair.
Cordless For styling freedom. For a fully charged battery it has a 16 Hour Charge Time.
3 Year Manufacturer's Guarantee Plus 1 extra year when you register the product online.
description: Product Description Take care of your hair and facial hair with confidence, using the All In One Grooming Kit that has Self-Sharpening Stainless Steel Blades. Its 30mm Main Trimmer has an Adjustable Beard and Hair Comb that attaches to give you 2mm-16mm Length Settings or choose from 3 x Fixed Combs (3mm-9mm). Perfect the finer details, like neatening up sideburns with the Detail Trimmer and trim away any unwanted hair with the Linear Nose and Ear Trimmer. Safety Warning Do not use near water sources. Keep away from eyes and skin. Follow the recommended cleaning and maintenance instructions.
